---
title: "William Henderson"
---

## William Henderson

**Dates:** (b. 1815/6)

### Description

uncle of Susanna Warren

### Biography

His address was 3 South Bailey, Durham;  he was a woollen manufacturer, and uncle (though younger) of Susanna Warren.

### Letters

- Letter from [13 November 1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
